title: Premium Dried Cod Skin Rings - Fish Treats For Dogs, Promoting Healthy Teeth and Coat The Perfect Grain Free Dog Treats. 1 x 4 Pack
features: 100% NATURAL GOODNESS: Our dried cod skin rings are made from premium quality cod skin, free from additives and preservatives.
DENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT: The natural texture helps reduce plaque and tartar build-up, promoting better oral hygiene and fresher breath, great dog teeth cleaning chews
RICH IN OMEGA-3 FATTY ACIDS: Boost your dog's overall well-being with essential omega-3 fatty acids for a shiny coat and joint support.
HIGH-PROTEIN, LOW FAT SNACK: Treat your furry friend to a protein-packed, low fat snack that's perfect for training or everyday rewards.
SOURCED SUSTAINABLY: We prioritize sustainability, ensuring that our cod skin is responsibly sourced and processed to meet the highest quality standards providing outstanding natural dog chews.
This is a 100% natural product and size and colour may vary
description: Product description Indulge your canine companion with our Premium Dried Cod Skin Rings - the ultimate natural dog treat for a happy and healthy pet! Made from 100% pure cod skin, these rings are a delicious and nutritious snack that your dog will love. Indications All Life Stages Ingredients Cod Directions As part of a balanced diet See more
